channel.title: Remote-Desktop on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Remote-Desktop on Pi Stack

item.title: Kasm Workspaces vs LinuxServer Webtop vs x2go: Self-Hosted Browser Desktop Guide 2026
item.description: When you need remote access to a full desktop environment through a web browser, you have several self-hosted options — each with different architectures, resource footprints, and use cases. Whether you are isolating risky browsing sessions, providing developers with pre-configured workspaces, or accessing your home lab from anywhere, choosing the right platform matters.
